svg.text: Irrigation fault simulator — electrical ladder (controller, relay, wiring)
Transformer hot bus → per-zone triac → field wire → solenoid coil, all returning on one shared COMMON bus to the transformer.
The relay coil has its OWN return (so a broken common drops the zones but not the pump). Gold = energised, grey = dead, red ✕ = injected fault.

g.text: 230 V power side — modelled as a chain, not a closed loop (no neutral / capacitor; see sim_spec)
S1 Electrical - cond.common broken (shared coil return)
230 V power side — modelled as a chain, not a closed loop (no neutral / capacitor; see sim_spec)
S2 Valve pilot loop - Z1 metering_port clogged (only Z2 commanded)
230 V power side — modelled as a chain, not a closed loop (no neutral / capacitor; see sim_spec)
S3 Hydraulic leak - Z1.hose1 burst (Z1 commanded)
230 V power side — modelled as a chain, not a closed loop (no neutral / capacitor; see sim_spec)
